title: Screw System Specification
description: Standard format for spinal screw system catalogues. Used to import/export system data into spine-planner's SYSTEM_CATALOGUE.

system.description: System name as it appears in SCREW_SYSTEMS (e.g. 'Xia 3', 'CREO')

manufacturer.description: Primary manufacturer name as it appears in IMPLANT_COMPANIES

alsoSoldBy.description: Other companies that sell this system (e.g. VB Spine sells Stryker systems)

type.description: System category — cervical, thoracolumbar, occipitocervical (oct), or minimally invasive (mis)

status.description: Whether this system is currently manufactured and sold

source.description: Document or catalogue the data was taken from

lastVerified.description: Date the data was last verified against manufacturer documentation (ISO 8601)

diameters.description: Available screw diameters in mm, sorted ascending

lengthsByDiameter.description: Available screw lengths (mm) keyed by diameter string (e.g. '6.5'). Each value is a sorted array of lengths.

materials.description: Available rod materials (must match ROD_MATERIALS in implants.ts)

profiles.description: Available rod profiles (must match ROD_PROFILES in implants.ts)
